utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified: (1) property: includes address/type/details/price/fees/taxes/viewing date—sufficient. (2) financing: includes mortgage type, rate, term, down payment, amount, monthly payment, total monthly cost, pre-approval—sufficient. (3) legal_services: firm, service, cost, scope, timeline—sufficient. (4) moving_services: company, service, cost, inclusions, timeline—sufficient. (5) setup_services: utilities (setup cost, monthly range, providers, services) and inspections (providers, itemized costs, total, timeline)—sufficient. (6) total_budget: price, down payment, closing costs, line items, totals, monthly costs, affordability—sufficient, though one minor inconsistency: total_additional_costs listed as CAD $3,950 doesn’t sum the other line items, but the item is still present. Therefore, 6/6 items are included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes: (1) a purchase property labeled 'Commercial Conversion Loft - Arts District, Toronto' which aligns with the ground-truth 'Commercial Conversion' under purchase_properties; (2) financing 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage' which maps to 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing; (3) legal services 'Premium Legal Package' which maps directly under essential_legal_services; (4) moving services 'Premium Moving Package' which maps to 'Premium Moving' under moving_services; (5) utility setup using a business-oriented package with price CAD $450, which corresponds to 'Business Setup' under utility_setup; (6) inspections listing 'Full Structural Survey' at CAD $650 and 'Specialist Survey' at CAD $450, which map to 'Full Structural Survey' and 'Specialist Survey' respectively.
